name: Brock Peters
abstract: Brock Peters (born George Fisher; July 2, 1927 – August 23, 2005) was an American actor, best known for playing the villainous "Crown" in the 1959 film version of Porgy and Bess, and Tom Robinson in the 1962 film To Kill a Mockingbird. He made his Broadway debut in the 1965 Norman Rosten play Mister Johnson.

concerts.label: Benefit Concert for C.O.R.E. and Virginia - Jamaica Student Help Project
Artists' Tribute to the Life of Paul Robeson (1898-1976)
Associated Black Charities' Black History Makers Award

about_quotes.speaker: Al Hall
about_quotes.evidence: We had a good band. And Dick had written the arrangements for the actor. I can't think of his name right now. [Brock Peters] We spent the whole session trying to make the band not sound good.
